cases.explanation: Scatter-gather: 01394_800701D70 splits 293K US Dollar across 15 intermediaries between 2022/09/02 and 2022/09/06, and the funds reconverge on 011495_800A08E20. Every individual transfer looks innocent — the dispersal and reconvergence is only visible as a two-hop graph structure.

Round-tripping: 16K Euro leaves 012503_801C612A0 and returns to it through 11 hops between 2022/09/03 and 2022/09/07, with 81% surviving every hop. Money that travels in a circle has no business purpose — the loop itself is the tell.
